description_long: This object consists of three boxy air conditioning units mounted in a row on a vertical support, each with a prominent front grille and visible fan blades behind the grille. The units are rectangular, with the front face featuring a circular fan opening and horizontal slats for air intake or output. The sides and tops of the units are plain, with no visible controls or branding, and the rear appears to be solid. The units are spaced evenly along the support, suggesting a modular installation typical for external building walls. The color scheme is primarily light gray or off-white, with metallic and plastic elements visible in the grille and fan areas. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on function and durability for outdoor urban environments.
description: A set of three rectangular, wall-mounted air conditioner units with front-facing grilles and visible fan blades, arranged vertically on a support. The units are light gray and have a utilitarian, modular design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the three stacked air conditioner units and their mounting support.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular fan grilles and intake slats of all three air conditioner units.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the depth and boxy shape of the units, with mounting details visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain, solid backs of the three air conditioner units with no visible openings or features.
attribute_grille_pattern: Horizontal slats with a central circular opening for the fan, evenly spaced and parallel across the front face.
attribute_exhaust_vent_design: Three front-facing vents, each with a circular fan opening and horizontal slats, positioned centrally on each unit.
